title: Decoding Alien Messages
prompt: Rearrange the code blocks to form a function that decodes alien messages using a codebook. Words not found in the codebook should be replaced with 'UNKNOWN'. The decoded message should have words separated by a single space.
grading_rule: All blocks must be in the correct order to pass.
